fundamentals.name: SPDR Gold Shares
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: The Trust holds gold bars and from time to time, issues Baskets in exchange for deposits of gold and distributes gold in connection with redemptions of Baskets. The investment objective of the Trust is for the Shares to reflect the performance of the price of gold bullion, less the Trust’s expenses. The Sponsor believes that, for many investors, the Shares represent a cost-effective investment in gold.

news.paragraph: A veteran Goldman strategist has made a bold prediction of gold reaching $10,000, signaling significant bullish sentiment for the precious metal. This comes as the dollar holds firm amid uncertainty surrounding an Iran deal, a situation that could impact gold ETFs. The confluence of expert opinion and geopolitical factors suggests potential upside for gold.

headlines.title: Veteran Goldman strategist makes stunning $10,000 gold call
Dollar Holds Firm Amid Iran Deal Uncertainty: ETFs to Win/ Lose
